pi_items.source: task_description and export_result.sh explicitly set the target tiddler title
task_description specifies tagging the tiddler as 'Dashboard'
Sum of 6 'Active' clients defined in setup_task.sh (100k+150k+200k+120k+80k+250k)
Sum of 4 'Prospect' clients defined in setup_task.sh (300k+50k+400k+150k)
Maximum revenue among 'Active' clients in setup_task.sh is Lambda Corp at 250000
Calculated by adding 400k to the original 900k based on export_result.sh mutating TechCorp's revenue from 100k to 500k
Prospect clients are untouched during the mutation phase in export_result.sh
After TechCorp is mutated to 500000, it becomes the new maximum among 'Active' clients

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on 12 synthetically generated client tiddlers injected directly by setup_task.sh. Calculations confirm the 'Active' clients sum to 900,000 (max: 250,000) and the 'Prospect' clients sum to 900,000. During evaluation, export_result.sh alters TechCorp's revenue from 100,000 to 500,000, accurately shifting the expected 'Active' sum to 1,300,000 and the maximum to 500,000 to test for dynamic math logic.
